title: Record Snapshot History with a Big Object
overview: A Big Object is created to store record-level Quote change history, indexed by RecordID__c and LastModifiedDate__c. A #Trigger on Quote (after insert, after update) writes a new history record whenever a Quote is created or modified.
generalUseCase: Use a #Trigger to automatically capture and store record snapshots in a Big Object each time a record is saved.
